name: Republique
short_description: Help a woman named Hope escape in a thrilling and topical stealth-action game that explores the perils of government surveillance in the Internet Age.
detailed_description:
Republique for Free - July 25, 2022

Hey everyone! Camouflaj recently passed a huge landmark—our ten year anniversary! To celebrate we will be making our debut title, REPUBLIQUE, free here on Steam in the coming days.

Thank you for all your support over the years. We couldn’t have done it without you.

------------------

Our MASSIVE Fall 2018 update is now available!

Camouflaj's most recent update to this episodic stealth thriller includes:

GAMEPAD SUPPORT: Play with a gamepad and control Hope directly, just like the console version

3 NEW COSTUMES FOR HOPE: The previously console-exclusive costumes are here, and they don't just look great, but change the way you play. (Costumes not available in Episode 4)

ENGINE UPGRADE: Our Unity 2017.4 update has enabled us to perform a ton of lighting and graphical upgrades, and improve performance across all devices.

TONS OF FIXES AND POLISH: We've implemented hundreds of bug fixes and improvements across the board to ensure this is the smoothest République experience yet.

JAPANESE LANGUAGE SUPPORT: Japanese players can now enjoy République in their native language!

NEW PRICE: République is now just $9.99! Pretty good deal, if you ask us.

For more details, check out our announcement here:

Thank you all from the bottom of our hearts for checking out République. Keep Hope Alive...


- Camouflaj

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
